description_long: This is a lidded porcelain vase with a classic rounded body and a domed lid topped by a small, pointed finial. The surface is decorated with intricate blue floral and foliage motifs on a white background, reminiscent of traditional Chinese blue-and-white ceramics. The lid features a matching blue floral pattern and a slightly flared rim that fits snugly over the vase's opening. The neck of the vase is encircled by a dark blue band with a repeating wave or scroll design, adding a distinct accent. The overall finish is glossy, giving the vase a smooth and reflective appearance. The object appears well-preserved, with no visible chips, cracks, or signs of wear.
description: A glossy, blue-and-white porcelain vase with a domed lid, decorated with intricate floral motifs and a dark blue accent band around the neck. The vase is elegant and well-preserved, with a smooth, reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed blue floral patterns and the prominent dark blue band around the neck.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the vase and the continuity of the floral motifs.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the rounded body and the seamless integration of the lid with the vase.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the consistent blue-and-white pattern and the smooth, glossy surface.
